initial_prompt: In the project at {workdir}, this python syntax_error fails: Python syntax error — likely Python version mismatch; disable bytecode cache to avoid stale .pyc. Reproduce the failure with `PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -B -m unittest discover -s . -p 'test_*.py'`, diagnose the root cause by reading the project files, and apply a fix so that same command exits 0.
